heroHeadline: CJNG Crisis Day 48 — El Mayo Sentencing Postponed to May 18 (2nd Delay), World Cup 61 Days Out
heroSubtitle: El Mayo Zambada's sentencing postponed again (April 10) from April 13 to May 18 — defense cites Mexico violence; potential cooperation implications eyed. O3 leads CJNG 48 days post-Mencho. World Cup opens June 11 with 100,000 security personnel deployed. Sheinbaum announces fracking plan to cut US natural gas dependence.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all Mexico-based Watchboard trackers. Data sourced from SEDENA, SESNSP, InSight Crime, OHCHR, and major international outlets.
